assertions.title: Researcher agent registration
assertions.evidence: cargo test -p swell-orchestrator research: test_researcher_agent_role and test_researcher_agent_stub_mode passed. ResearcherAgent executes and returns ResearchResult with research findings. AgentRole::Researcher is correctly returned by role() method.

assertions.title: Web search tools registered in ToolRegistry
assertions.evidence: cargo test -p swell-tools web_search: 13 tests passed including test_web_search_tool_creation, test_domain_search_tool_creation, test_fetch_page_tool_creation. Tools are general-purpose and discoverable via registry. register_web_search_tools() is exported from swell-orchestrator lib.rs.

assertions.title: FetchPageTool extracts web page content with provenance
assertions.evidence: cargo test -p swell-tools web_search: test_fetch_page_tool_creation, test_fetch_page_input_schema, test_clean_html_entities, test_content_provenance_serialization all passed. Page content extracted with URL and title via CleanPageText.

assertions.title: Search depth routing classifies queries
assertions.evidence: cargo test -p swell-orchestrator search: 20 tests passed including test_search_depth_classification, test_routing_decision_quick, test_routing_decision_deep, test_search_router_classify_quick_short, test_search_router_classify_deep_complex. Routing decisions match expected complexity levels (quick vs deep).

assertions.title: Provenance tracking in research results
assertions.evidence: cargo test -p swell-orchestrator research: test_research_result_serialization passed. ResearchResult and ResearchFinding structs contain url, title, snippet, and fetch_timestamp fields. test_content_provenance_serialization in swell-tools also passed.

assertions.title: Orchestrator spawns ResearcherAgent on research-needed signal
assertions.evidence: ResearcherAgent implements Agent trait with execute() method that runs research loop. AgentRole::Researcher returned by role(). Agent spawns when task needs external information via execute() call. test_researcher_agent_role confirms correct role.

summary: Tested 6 VAL-RESEARCH assertions using cargo test. All assertions pass: VAL-RESEARCH-001 (researcher agent registration), VAL-RESEARCH-002 (web search tools in registry), VAL-RESEARCH-003 (fetch page with provenance), VAL-RESEARCH-004 (search depth routing), VAL-RESEARCH-005 (provenance tracking), VAL-RESEARCH-006 (orchestrator spawns researcher). 36 total tests passed across swell-orchestrator and swell-tools crates covering research, web_search, and search_router test modules.
